name: clean-video
description: Local, open-source video cleanup pipeline (Loom-replacement post-processing): denoise, silence cutting, filler-word removal, auto captions.

scripts.build:all: npm run build && npm run build:ui
scripts.dev:ui: concurrently -k "npm run dev -- ui sample-videos/demo.mp4 --no-open --port 5199" "npm --prefix web-ui run dev"
